title: Prologis Reports Third Quarter 2024 Earnings
summary: Prologis reported Q3 2024 core FFO of $1.43 per diluted share, representing a 9% increase year-over-year. Total revenues reached $1.9 billion for the quarter.
highlights: Core FFO of $1.43 per diluted share, up 9% YoY

title: Prologis Acquires 12-Property Industrial Portfolio in Chicago
summary: Prologis announced the acquisition of a 12-property industrial portfolio in the Chicago metro area for approximately $480 million, adding 6.2 million square feet to its Midwest holdings.
highlights: Properties located in key Chicago logistics corridors

title: Prologis Expands Presence in Dallas-Fort Worth with New Development
summary: Prologis broke ground on a 2.4 million square foot logistics campus in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area, expected to be completed in Q2 2025 with an estimated investment of $320 million.

title: Prologis Reports First Quarter 2024 Earnings
summary: Prologis reported Q1 2024 core FFO of $1.28 per diluted share. The company raised its full-year 2024 guidance citing strong demand for logistics real estate.
highlights: Core FFO of $1.28 per diluted share
Rent growth of 68% on lease rollovers

title: Prologis Announces $1.5 Billion Sustainability-Linked Bond Offering
summary: Prologis priced a $1.5 billion sustainability-linked bond offering to fund green building initiatives and solar energy installations across its global portfolio.
highlights: Funds solar installations on warehouse rooftops

title: Prologis Completes Merger with Duke Realty
summary: Prologis completed its $26 billion merger with Duke Realty, making it the largest industrial real estate company in the United States with over 1 billion square feet under management.
highlights: Over 1 billion sq ft under management
Largest industrial REIT in the US
Significant presence added in Southeast and Midwest markets

title: Prologis Launches AI-Powered Property Management Platform
summary: Prologis unveiled an AI-powered property management platform called Essentials, designed to help tenants manage energy, maintenance, and logistics operations across leased properties.
highlights: Expected to reduce tenant operating costs by 15%

title: Prologis Reports Record Second Quarter 2023 Earnings
summary: Prologis reported record Q2 2023 core FFO of $1.36 per diluted share driven by record rent growth of 78% on lease rollovers and near full occupancy across its global portfolio.
highlights: Record core FFO of $1.36 per diluted share
Rent growth of 78% on lease rollovers
